author: lOrm
content: SKIPPED in this worktree (fix: #733 #734 #737). The hard-coded `.openclaudia/permissions.json` PathBuf::from() lives in src/subagent.rs:1058, which is in this worktree's forbidden-edit list. Equivalent path coupling exists in src/main.rs:587 and src/acp.rs:385; all three call PermissionManager::new(...) with the same hardcoded relative path. Proper fix requires either lifting the path to a Config field (load once in main, pass everywhere) or accepting a &Path arg the caller resolves. Deferred to a pass that may edit subagent.rs.
